ConversationStart.command: bash -c 'BRANCH=$(git branch --show-current 2>/dev/null) || { echo "WORKBRANCH: Not in a git repository."; exit 0; }; if [ -z "$BRANCH" ]; then echo "WORKBRANCH: Not on any branch (detached HEAD)."; exit 0; fi; TEAM="ENGG"; if [ -f .workbranch.json ]; then TEAM=$(python3 -c "import json; d=json.load(open(\".workbranch.json\")); print(d.get(\"team\", \"ENGG\"))" 2>/dev/null || echo "ENGG"); fi; echo "WORKBRANCH: Branch is $BRANCH (team: $TEAM)"; which linear >/dev/null 2>&1 || { echo "WORKBRANCH: linear CLI not installed. Install it to enable project linking."; exit 0; }; PROJECTS=$(linear project list --json 2>&1) || { echo "WORKBRANCH: linear CLI error (auth may not be configured). Run: linear auth"; exit 0; }; MATCH=$(echo "$PROJECTS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; projects=json.load(sys.stdin); matches=[p for p in projects if p.get(\"description\",\"\") and \"[branch: $BRANCH]\" in p[\"description\"]]; print(json.dumps(matches[0]) if matches else \"\")" 2>/dev/null); if [ -z "$MATCH" ]; then echo "WORKBRANCH: No Linear project linked to branch $BRANCH."; echo "WORKBRANCH: Run /workbranch-init to create and link a project."; exit 0; fi; echo "$MATCH" | python3 -c "import sys,json; p=json.load(sys.stdin); n=p.get(\"name\",\"unknown\"); s=p.get(\"status\",{}).get(\"name\",\"unknown\"); u=p.get(\"url\",\"n/a\"); print(\"WORKBRANCH: Linked project: \"+n+\"  Status: \"+s+\"  URL: \"+u)"; PROJECT_NAME=$(echo "$MATCH" | python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get(\"name\",\"\"))" 2>/dev/null); ISSUES=$(linear issue list --project "$PROJECT_NAME" --all-states --all-assignees --json --no-pager 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ISSUES" ]; then echo "$ISSUES" | python3 -c "import sys,json; issues=json.load(sys.stdin); print(\"WORKBRANCH: Issues (\"+str(len(issues))+\"):\"); [print(\"  - [\"+i.get(\"state\",{}).get(\"name\",\"?\")+\"] \"+i.get(\"identifier\",\"\")+\": \"+i.get(\"title\",\"\")) for i in issues]" 2>/dev/null; fi; DOCS=$(linear doc list --project "$PROJECT_NAME" --json 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$DOCS" ]; then echo "$DOCS" | python3 -c "import sys,json; docs=json.load(sys.stdin); print(\"WORKBRANCH: Documents (\"+str(len(docs))+\"):\"); [print(\"  - \"+d.get(\"title\",\"\")+\"  \"+d.get(\"url\",\"\")) for d in docs]" 2>/dev/null; fi'
